title: SableEdit
body:
This mod aims to provide compatibility between Sable and WorldEdit. 
> Still in development, expect very bad things to happen!

## Current features:
- Don't allow players to make selections between different sub-levels or the main world
- Player positioning and orientation is relative to the currently selected sub-level
- Optional WorldEdit CUI support (if installed on the client)
- //assemble command to assemble current WorldEdit selection
